title: Expressions, Control Flow, Iteration, Switches, and Deferred Work · Goroutine Forensics
summary: A retry policy must classify states, bound attempts, accumulate evidence, and guarantee cleanup across early returns. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a bounded retry and classification engine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Trace arithmetic, comparison, logical, bitwise, shift, precedence, conversion, and evaluation-order guarantees from concrete values.
Use if statements with optional initializers and narrow variable scope around the decision they support.
Build bounded for loops and range loops while reasoning about copied iteration values, indexes, order, and Go 1.22 loop variables.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
